title: Microsoft's Nadella criticizes Anthropic's Fable for being 'editorially controlled'
summary: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella criticized Anthropic's Fable model for being "editorially controlled," despite Microsoft's close relationship with Anthropic. The criticism reflects differing approaches to AI model development and data privacy.
content: Microsoft enjoys close ties to Anthropic, but it's also working to help companies refine models that keep their data private.

zh.title: 微软首席执行官纳德拉批评Anthropic的Fable模型"编辑受控"
zh.summary: 微软首席执行官萨蒂亚·纳德拉批评Anthropic的Fable模型被"编辑受控"，尽管微软与Anthropic关系密切。这一批评反映了AI模型开发和数据隐私方面的不同方法。

title: Palo Alto Networks’ stock has been on a tear — and it could go even higher, according to these bulls
summary: Palo Alto Networks' stock has roughly doubled in three months as investors increasingly view AI adoption as driving demand for cybersecurity products. Bullish analysts see potential for further gains.
content: The company’s shares have roughly doubled over the past three months, as investors have warmed to the idea that AI is increasing the need for cybersecurity products.

zh.title: Palo Alto Networks股票涨势强劲——看涨分析师认为还有进一步上升空间
zh.summary: Palo Alto Networks的股票在三个月内翻了一番，因为投资者越来越认为AI采用会推动对网络安全产品的需求。看涨的分析师认为还有进一步上升的潜力。

title: As SpaceX’s stock notches first close below IPO price, the company is gearing up for a crucial launch
summary: SpaceX's stock closed below its IPO price for the first time as the company prepares for a critical rocket launch. Analysts view the launch's success as essential to the company's prospects.
content: The megarocket’s success is SpaceX’s “single most important watch item,” one analyst says.

zh.title: SpaceX股票首次收盘价跌破IPO价格，公司准备进行关键发射
zh.summary: SpaceX股票首次收盘价跌破IPO价格，因为该公司准备进行一次关键的火箭发射。分析师认为发射的成功对公司的前景至关重要。

title: Americans say they need $1.2 million to retire. Most are too deep in debt to get there.
summary: Americans report needing approximately $1.2 million for retirement, but many face significant debt obstacles to reaching that goal. Over 80% of Americans express anxiety about outliving their savings.
content: More than 80% of Americans worry about running out of money in retirement: “It really keeps them up at night.”

zh.title: 美国人表示退休需要120万美元 大多数人债务过多无法实现
zh.summary: 美国人报告称退休需要约120万美元，但许多人面临重大债务障碍而无法实现这一目标。80%以上的美国人对储蓄不足以支撑退休生活感到焦虑。

title: The financial winners and losers from the World Cup
summary: The 2026 World Cup is generating significant revenue off the field, with distinct financial winners and losers across the tournament ecosystem. The distribution of profits reveals who is benefiting most from the major sporting event.
content: Big bucks are being made from the 2026 tournament off the field, but who is raking in the most?

zh.title: 2026世界杯的经济赢家和输家
zh.summary: 2026世界杯在场外产生了大量收入，在整个赛事生态系统中出现了明显的经济赢家和输家。利润分配显示了谁从这项重大体育赛事中获益最多。

title: I wouldn't marry him until he paid off his debt, now I'm in charge of our money
summary: Sarah conditioned marriage on her husband paying off his debt, and now manages the couple's shared finances after 25 years of marriage. The arrangement reflects evolving dynamics in joint financial management.
content: Sarah and her husband have shared one account for 25 years, but she says managing it falls to her.

zh.title: 我坚持他先还清债务才能结婚，现在我掌管我们的财务
zh.summary: 莎拉以支付债务为条件同意结婚，在25年的婚姻生活中现在管理夫妻共同财务。这种安排反映了联合财务管理中不断演变的动态。

title: GE boosts profit outlook, but stock falls as booming order growth cools
summary: GE Aerospace raised its profit guidance after earnings results but saw shares decline as the company's order-book growth rate showed signs of deceleration. The market reaction suggests investor concerns about sustaining growth momentum despite otherwise positive results.
content: GE Aerospace’s stock falls after earnings, again, with recently rapid order-book growth slowing.

zh.title: GE上调利润指导,但随着订单增长放缓股票下跌
zh.summary: GE航空航天在财报公布后上调了利润指导,但由于公司订单簿增长率出现放缓迹象,股票反而下跌。市场反应表明投资者担忧该公司能否维持增长势头,尽管业绩在其他方面向好。

title: Jim Cramer says the pullback in this aerospace giant is a buying opportunity
summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer characterizes GE Aerospace's post-earnings stock decline as an overreaction, emphasizing the company's strong quarterly beat-and-raise performance. He views the sell-off as a buying opportunity for investors.
content: CNBC’s Jim Cramer said GE Aerospace's post-earnings sell-off overlooks another strong beat-and-raise quarter.

zh.title: 吉姆·克莱默表示这家航空航天巨头的回调是买入机会
zh.summary: CNBC的吉姆·克莱默将通用电气航空航天公司季度后股价下跌描述为过度反应，强调该公司强劲的季度超预期和提升业绩表现。他认为这次抛售为投资者提供了买入机会。

title: ‘It’s heartbreaking’: My brother claimed Social Security at 70. He died from cancer after one payment. Why wait to claim?
summary: A personal account documents the death of a cancer patient who claimed Social Security at age 70 but died after receiving just one payment, raising questions about the wisdom of delaying benefits. The story highlights mortality risks associated with waiting strategies.
content: “I’ve always been a little skeptical of the government’s encouragement to delay claiming benefits.”

zh.title: "令人心碎"：我哥哥在70岁时申请社会保障。他在领取一次后因癌症去世。为什么要等待申请呢？
zh.summary: 一份个人叙述记录了一名癌症患者在70岁申请社会保障后仅收到一次付款后去世的情况，引发了人们对延迟领取福利智慧性的质疑。该故事强调了与等待策略相关的死亡风险。

title: Netflix stock falls as earnings forecast disappoints, company says it will give fewer engagement updates
summary: Netflix shares fell after disappointing earnings guidance, with the company announcing it will reduce the frequency of its engagement metrics reports. The move appears aimed at limiting investor scrutiny of subscriber trends and viewer behavior data.
content: The streaming giant said it would cut back on the frequency of its "What We Watched" reports, which provide a picture of engagement.

zh.title: Netflix股票因盈利预测令人失望而下跌，公司表示将减少用户参与数据更新
zh.summary: Netflix股票在令人失望的盈利指引后下跌，该公司宣布将减少用户参与指标报告的频率。此举似乎旨在限制投资者对用户趋势和观看行为数据的审查。

title: Alphabet’s stock falls as Gemini delays suggest Google is struggling to keep up in the AI race
summary: Alphabet shares dropped over 4% as delays in the Gemini AI product raised concerns about Google's competitive position in artificial intelligence. The market reaction reflects investor worries about the company's ability to keep pace with AI rivals.
content: Alphabet shares fell more than 4% on Thursday, reflecting concerns that the Google parent company is falling further behind in the artificial-intelligence race.

zh.title: Alphabet股票下跌，Gemini延迟表明谷歌在AI竞赛中难以跟上
zh.summary: 由于Gemini AI产品延迟，Alphabet股票下跌超4%，引发了对谷歌人工智能竞争地位的担忧。市场反应反映了投资者对该公司与AI竞争对手保持同步能力的担忧。

title: AG pick Blanche to meet with Epstein survivors after 2 GOP senators hedge on nomination
summary: Attorney General nominee Todd Blanche will meet with Jeffrey Epstein survivors to address concerns about his record on sex-trafficking cases after two GOP senators expressed hesitation about supporting his confirmation. The meetings aim to secure bipartisan backing for his nomination.
content: Sen. Thom Tillis, R-N.C., wants Todd Blanche to meet with victims of sex offender Jeffrey Epstein before committing his support for the nomination.

zh.title: AG候选人Blanche在2名共和党参议员对提名表示保留后将与Epstein受害者见面
zh.summary: 司法部长候选人Todd Blanche将在两名共和党参议员对支持其确认表示犹豫后，与Jeffrey Epstein受害者见面，以解决对他在性贩运案件中记录的担忧。这些会议旨在为其提名获得两党支持。

title: Business Daily
summary: The program covers China's economic slowdown, New York's emerging focus on AI development hubs, and a giveaway of tropical fruit. Multiple business topics are featured in this edition.
content: China's economy slows, New York targets AI centres, and the ‘king of fruits’ giveaway

zh.title: 商业每日

title: How Morgan Stanley is positioning its income portfolio right now
summary: Morgan Stanley recommends that income-focused investors move beyond the traditional 60/40 stock-bond portfolio allocation in favor of greater diversification. The firm outlines its current portfolio positioning strategy for generating investor returns.
content: Investors seeking income should diversify beyond the traditional 60/40, according to Morgan Stanley. Here is how its portfolio breaks down.

zh.title: Morgan Stanley目前如何定位其收益组合
zh.summary: Morgan Stanley建议收益导向型投资者超越传统的60/40股债组合配置，转向更大的多元化。该公司概述了其当前的投资组合定位策略，以产生投资者回报。

title: These cities are blanketed with wildfire smoke. Here’s what to know about bad air quality.
summary: Multiple major U.S. cities—Chicago, Detroit, Minneapolis, and New York—are experiencing severe air pollution from wildfire smoke, posing cardiovascular risks to residents. Poor air quality from wildfires is becoming an increasing health concern nationwide.
content: “It is a growing cardiovascular threat”: Chicago, Detroit, Minneapolis and New York City are considered some of the world’s most polluted cities Thursday.

zh.title: 这些城市被野火烟雾笼罩。了解空气质量恶劣需要知道的事项
zh.summary: 美国多个主要城市——芝加哥、底特律、明尼阿波利斯和纽约——正经历野火烟雾造成的严重空气污染，对居民心血管健康构成威胁。野火导致的空气质量恶劣正成为全国日益关注的健康问题。

title: White House teleprompter operator accused of making $100k off Trump speech bets
summary: A White House teleprompter operator is accused of leveraging advance knowledge of presidential speeches to place nearly $100,000 in bets on Kalshi, raising insider trading concerns. The incident highlights potential security vulnerabilities in access to sensitive political information.
content: A White House staffer has been accused of using inside knowledge of speeches to make nearly $100,000 on Kalshi.

zh.title: 白宫提词员被控利用特朗普演讲下注赚取10万美元
zh.summary: 一名白宫提词员被指利用总统演讲的提前信息在Kalshi平台下注近10万美元，引发内幕交易担忧。该事件暴露了对敏感政治信息访问权限的潜在安全漏洞。

title: Dallas Fed President Logan calls for 'modestly' higher interest rates
summary: Dallas Federal Reserve President Logan advocates for modestly higher interest rates despite recent positive inflation data. The comment suggests ongoing inflation concerns warrant continued monetary restraint despite recent economic improvements.
content: The policymaker said this week's good inflation news wasn't good enough.

zh.title: 达拉斯联邦储备银行主席洛根呼吁'适度'提高利率
zh.summary: 达拉斯联邦储备银行主席洛根尽管最近通胀数据表现积极，但仍主张适度提高利率。这一言论表明，持续的通胀担忧足以保证继续采取货币紧缩政策，尽管最近经济有所改善。

title: Here's a rapid-fire update on our stock portfolio, including the 5 names to buy
summary: Jim Cramer and Jeff Marks provided portfolio updates and stock recommendations during their monthly Investing Club meeting. The session featured their latest investment thesis and top picks for the month.
content: Jim Cramer and Jeff Marks offered their latest thoughts on the Investing Club's portfolio during the July Monthly Meeting.

title: Trump Media launches paid data service to help Wall Street track Trump’s posts
summary: Trump Media has launched a paid API service that provides institutional investors real-time access to President Trump's Truth Social posts. The service monetizes access to posts that may move financial markets.
content: Trump Media launched an API to give paying customers real-time access to market-moving Truth Social posts.

zh.title: Trump Media推出付费数据服务，帮助华尔街追踪特朗普的帖子
zh.summary: Trump Media推出了付费API服务，为机构投资者提供对特朗普总统Truth Social帖子的实时访问权限。该服务将可能影响金融市场的帖子访问权货币化。

title: It’s a buyer’s market for bonds
summary: As institutional investors reduce bond exposure, individual investors may find attractive opportunities in undervalued fixed-income securities. The shift in investor sentiment creates potential entry points for retail investors.
content: Bonds are out of fashion with big investors — which makes them an interesting investment opportunity for the rest of us.

zh.title: 债券市场是买方市场
zh.summary: 随着机构投资者减少债券敞口，个人投资者可能会在被低估的固定收益证券中发现有吸引力的机会。投资者情绪的转变为零售投资者创造了潜在的切入点。

title: Here's why the housing market is hurting so much this summer
summary: The housing market faces significant headwinds from elevated mortgage rates, record-high home prices, and consumer financial stress, causing existing home sales and builder confidence to decline. Multiple economic pressures are constraining residential real estate activity.
content: Mortgage rates are high, home prices at record levels and consumers stressed. These are all contributing to a drop in existing home sales and builder sentiment.

zh.title: 为什么住房市场在今年夏天遭受如此大的打击
zh.summary: 住房市场面临来自高抵押贷款利率、创纪录的高房价和消费者财务压力的重大逆风，导致现有住房销售和建筑商信心下降。多重经济压力制约了住宅房地产活动。

title: Trump’s media company wants traders to pay to get president’s market-moving social-media posts first
summary: Trump's media company is monetizing early access to presidential social media posts through a paid API service for institutional traders. The service positions market-moving political statements as premium financial data.
content: “Truth API” will be available to institutional customers starting next month.

zh.title: 特朗普的媒体公司希望交易者付费以首先获得总统具有市场影响力的社交媒体帖子

title: Trump suspends teleprompter operator over Kalshi bets allegations, White House says
summary: The White House suspended a teleprompter operator who allegedly placed over $90,000 in bets based on advance knowledge of Trump speeches. Kalshi, the betting platform, retained most of the profits from the trades.
content: Kalshi retained most of the profits, which were more than $90,000, from the trades made on public statements by President Trump.

zh.title: 特朗普因卡尔希赌博指控暂停远程提示操作员，白宫表示
zh.summary: 白宫暂停了一名远程提示操作员，该操作员据称基于提前获得的特朗普演讲知识进行了超过9万美元的赌博。赌博平台卡尔希保留了大部分交易利润。

title: Trump is set to deliver an election-focused national address tonight. Here's what to know
summary: President Trump is delivering a national address focused on election integrity and democratic principles. He emphasized the importance of fair elections as foundational to national governance.
content: "Without free and fair elections, you don't have a country," Trump said this week when asked to preview the speech.

zh.title: 特朗普今晚将发表以选举为焦点的全国讲话。需要了解的内容如下
zh.summary: 特朗普总统将发表以选举完整性和民主原则为焦点的全国讲话。他强调了公正选举作为国家治理基础的重要性。

title: Short sellers load up against SpaceX as stock drops below IPO price
summary: Short sellers are aggressively betting against SpaceX as its stock has fallen below its IPO price, with 185 million shares sold short—about 29% of publicly tradable float. The increased bearish positioning reflects investor concern over the company's valuation.
content: About 185 million SpaceX shares are now sold short, representing roughly 29% of the company's publicly tradable float, according to S3.

zh.title: 随着股价跌破IPO价格，空头开始大举做空SpaceX
zh.summary: 随着SpaceX股价跌至IPO价格以下，空头投资者正在积极做空，1.85亿股被卖空——约占公开交易流通股的29%。空头头寸增加反映了投资者对公司估值的担忧。

title: Micron has turned into ‘the most important stock in the market.’ So is it time to worry?
summary: Micron has become a key market indicator for investor sentiment on semiconductor demand and artificial intelligence trends, despite concerns about memory chip market cycles. Analysts argue the stock remains undervalued relative to potential earnings scenarios.
content: While investors are concerned about a memory peak, analysts say the stock still looks cheap relative to various earnings scenarios.

zh.title: 美光已成为"市场上最重要的股票"。现在该担心吗？
zh.summary: 美光已成为投资者对半导体需求和人工智能趋势情绪的关键市场指标，尽管存在对存储芯片市场周期的担忧。分析师认为该股票相对于潜在收益情景仍被低估。

title: ‘Respect is important’: If my financial adviser said, ‘Hey,’ my wife and I would walk out. Where do you draw the line?
summary: The article explores professional standards in financial advisory relationships, sharing an anecdote about a financial representative lacking basic knowledge of major companies. It raises questions about competence and respect in advisor-client interactions.
content: “I met with a financial representative who was not aware that AT&T was the shortened form of American Telephone and Telegraph.”

zh.title: 《尊重很重要》:如果财务顾问只是随便打招呼，我和妻子就会离开。你的底线在哪里?
zh.summary: 这篇文章探讨了财务顾问关系中的专业标准，分享了一个财务代表缺乏对大公司基本了解的轶事。文章提出了关于顾问-客户互动中的能力和尊重的问题。

title: Buy the contractor before the renovation is complete: This stock's next growth phase is taking shape
summary: An analyst recommends buying a stock currently trading at historically low valuations as company fundamentals improve and growth catalysts emerge. The stock represents a contrarian opportunity before the market recognizes its upside potential.
content: The stock is trading near the low end of historical multiples despite improving fundamentals and catalysts ahead.

zh.title: 在装修完成前买入承包商:这只股票的下一个增长阶段正在成形
zh.summary: 一位分析师建议在公司基本面改善和增长催化剂出现之际，购买目前以历史低估值交易的股票。该股票代表了市场认可其上升潜力之前的逆向机会。

title: Most Americans don’t know how to prevent dementia. Here’s what you can do.
summary: Most Americans lack knowledge about dementia prevention strategies, yet research shows brain health can be managed throughout one's lifetime. Simple preventive measures can be started at any age to reduce cognitive decline risk.
content: ‘Brain health is a lifelong commitment — it’s never too early or too late to start’

zh.title: 大多数美国人不知道如何预防痴呆症。你可以这样做。
zh.summary: 大多数美国人缺乏关于痴呆症预防策略的知识，但研究表明脑健康可以在整个生命周期内管理。简单的预防措施可以在任何年龄开始实施，以降低认知衰退的风险。

title: Who qualifies for the bigger IRS tax break on gas — and how to get the most of it
summary: The IRS is expanding tax deductions for fuel expenses as gas prices threaten to reach $4 per gallon. Eligible drivers can claim larger write-offs, providing relief amid rising transportation costs. This could help offset household expenses during a period of economic uncertainty.
content: Gas prices could return to $4 soon, and the IRS is going to let some drivers write off more of their fuel expenses.

zh.title: 谁有资格获得更大的IRS汽油税收减免——以及如何充分利用
zh.summary: 随着油价逼近每加仑4美元,美国国税局正在扩大燃油费用的税收减免范围。符合条件的驾驶员可以申请更大的扣除额,以缓解交通成本上升带来的压力。这可能有助于在经济不确定时期抵消家庭支出。

title: The Lehman Bros. moment of the AI bubble is coming, says this critic warning of fallout for tech stocks and the entire market
summary: AI critic Ed Zitron warns that the artificial intelligence industry faces a "Lehman Brothers moment" similar to the 2008 financial crisis. He argues OpenAI's collapse could trigger a broader market meltdown affecting tech stocks and investor portfolios. The warning reflects growing concerns about unsustainable AI valuations and business models.
content: OpenAI is going down, and taking investors and an entire industry with it, argues artificial-intelligence critic Ed Zitron.

zh.title: 批评人士警告AI泡沫的"雷曼兄弟时刻"即将到来,对科技股和整个市场造成影响
zh.summary: AI批评人士埃德·齐特伦警告人工智能行业面临类似于2008年金融危机的"雷曼兄弟时刻"。他辩称OpenAI的倒闭可能引发更广泛的市场崩溃,影响科技股和投资者投资组合。这一警告反映了人们对不可持续的AI估值和商业模式日益增长的担忧。

title: Eli Lilly to buy psychedelics maker AtaiBeckley for $2.8 billion as experimental treatments gain traction
summary: Eli Lilly is acquiring psychedelics company AtaiBeckley for $2.8 billion, gaining access to experimental treatments based on DMT and MDMA compounds. The deal reflects growing pharmaceutical interest in psychedelic-assisted therapies as clinical evidence for their effectiveness accumulates. This signals a major shift in how established drugmakers view alternative treatment modalities.
content: The deal for AtaiBeckley gives Lilly access to experimental drugs based on DMT and MDMA.

zh.title: 随着实验性治疗获得重视,礼来公司以28亿美元收购迷幻药制造商AtaiBeckley
zh.summary: 礼来公司以28亿美元收购迷幻药公司AtaiBeckley,获得了基于DMT和MDMA化合物的实验性治疗方法。这笔交易反映了制药业对迷幻药辅助疗法日益增长的兴趣,因为其有效性的临床证据不断积累。这标志着已建立的制药公司如何看待替代治疗方式的重大转变。

title: He backed Tesla and SpaceX before anyone else — here is the impossible bet he is making now
summary: Veteran venture capitalist Tim Draper, known for early investments in Tesla and SpaceX, discusses the current AI bubble and reflects on major opportunities he missed. Draper shares his perspective on whether the AI industry's rapid growth is sustainable and where future wealth creation may lie. His insights highlight the divergence between hype and fundamentals in emerging technology markets.
content: Veteran venture capitalist Tim Draper weighs in on the AI bubble and four huge opportunities he missed.

zh.title: 他早于任何人支持特斯拉和SpaceX——这是他现在正在进行的不可能的赌注
zh.summary: 资深风险投资家蒂姆·德雷珀因对特斯拉和SpaceX的早期投资而闻名,他讨论了当前的人工智能泡沫,并反思了他错过的重大机会。德雷珀分享了他对人工智能产业快速增长是否可持续以及未来财富创造可能在何处的看法。他的见解突出了新兴技术市场中炒作和基本面之间的偏差。

title: Early chip earnings reporters showing how high the bar really is
summary: Early earnings reports from chip manufacturers reveal increasingly high expectations set by Wall Street for AI-driven growth. Companies must deliver substantial results to justify elevated valuations tied to artificial intelligence demand. This earnings season will test whether reality matches the bullish forecasts priced into semiconductor stocks.
content: Wall Street will have to buckle up this earnings season, based on the early reports tied to the artificial intelligence trade.

zh.title: 早期芯片财报报告显示门槛有多高
zh.summary: 芯片制造商的早期财报显示,华尔街对人工智能驱动的增长设定了越来越高的期望。公司必须取得实质性成果,以证明与人工智能需求相关的高估值合理。这个财报季将测试现实是否与半导体股票定价的看涨预测相符。

title: Oil is facing a supply crunch — and the war in Iran isn’t the only problem
summary: The global oil market faces a supply crunch driven not only by tensions with Iran but also by constraints on Russia's refining capacity. J.P. Morgan strategists identify Russia's refining system limitations as a significant factor contributing to tightening markets. These dual pressures could sustain elevated oil prices and impact global energy security.
content: Constraints on Russia’s refining system have added to the existing crisis, strategists at J.P. Morgan said.

zh.title: 石油正面临供应紧张——伊朗战争不是唯一的问题
zh.summary: 全球石油市场面临供应紧张,这不仅是由伊朗紧张局势驱动,还受到俄罗斯炼油能力限制的影响。摩根大通策略师将俄罗斯炼油系统的局限性确定为导致市场紧张的重要因素。这些双重压力可能会维持高油价并影响全球能源安全。

title: IRS chief Bisignano: 'We should have every family enrolled in a Trump Account'
summary: IRS Chief Frank Bisignano advocates for widespread enrollment of American families in "Trump Accounts," with a specific goal of including 70 million children under 18. The initiative appears designed to broaden financial inclusion and government-sponsored savings mechanisms. The push reflects policy priorities around expanding access to government-backed financial products.
content: "I think the objective is to have 70 million children under 18 to have a Trump Account," IRS CEO Frank Bigisnano said.

zh.title: 国税局局长比西尼亚诺：'我们应该让每个家庭都参加特朗普账户'
zh.summary: 国税局局长弗兰克·比西尼亚诺倡导美国家庭广泛注册"特朗普账户"，目标特别是包括1800万名18岁以下的儿童。该计划似乎旨在扩大金融包容性和政府赞助的储蓄机制。这一推动反映了扩大对政府支持的金融产品访问权的政策优先事项。

title: The stock market has a ‘Magnificent Seven’ problem — but not the one bears are warning about
summary: Despite bearish warnings about the Magnificent Seven tech stocks, the real market concern centers on a potential trillion-dollar AI infrastructure bill. Wall Street fears the massive expense required for AI development, but strategists see significant payoff opportunities on the horizon. The article suggests that overlooked opportunities exist amid concentrated focus on well-known mega-cap companies.
content: Wall Street is terrified of a trillion-dollar AI bill — but the payoff is in sight.

zh.title: 股票市场有"宏伟七雄"问题——但不是熊市警告的那个
zh.summary: 尽管对宏伟七雄科技股票有熊市警告，真正的市场关注焦点集中在一项可能的数万亿美元的人工智能基础设施账单上。华尔街担心人工智能开发所需的巨大开支，但战略家们看到地平线上有重大的回报机会。该文章表明，尽管集中关注众所周知的大型公司，仍存在被忽视的机会。

title: I’m 67, own two homes outright worth $2.8 million, but I have $19,000 in credit-card debt. Should I get a HELOC?
summary: A 67-year-old retiree with significant real estate wealth but substantial credit card debt seeks advice on using a home equity line of credit. Their financial situation is complicated by the recent lymphoma diagnosis of their son, potentially requiring additional medical expenses. The case illustrates tensions between asset-rich, cash-poor retirement situations and unexpected family crises.
content: “My son was recently diagnosed with lymphoma, which may be related to burn-pit exposure during his military service in Afghanistan.”

zh.title: 我今年67岁，拥有两套价值280万美元的无贷款房产，但我有1.9万美元的信用卡债务。我应该申请房屋净值信用额度吗？
zh.summary: 一位67岁的退休人员拥有可观的房地产财富，但信用卡债务巨大，寻求关于使用房屋净值信用额度的建议。他们的财务状况因其儿子最近被诊断出淋巴瘤而复杂化，可能需要额外的医疗费用。这个案例说明了资产丰富、现金短缺的退休状况与意外家庭危机之间的紧张关系。

title: Running out of money is not the saddest retirement mistake you can make. This is.
summary: Financial experts argue that the most consequential retirement error extends beyond depleting savings, pointing to non-financial mistakes that impact life quality. The article suggests that relationship, health, and lifestyle decisions matter as much as or more than budgeting discipline. This perspective challenges conventional wisdom that focuses solely on financial depletion risk.
content: The saddest financial mistake in retirement has nothing to do with running out of money.

zh.title: 花光钱不是你在退休时能犯的最悲哀的错误。这才是。
zh.summary: 金融专家辩称，最具后果性的退休错误超越了储蓄枯竭，指向影响生活质量的非财务错误。该文章建议，关系、健康和生活方式决策与预算纪律一样重要或更为重要。这种观点挑战了仅关注财务枯竭风险的传统智慧。

title: Iran warns U.S. of Hormuz ‘red line,’ says it will retaliate to Trump’s strike threats
summary: Iran has issued warnings that U.S. strikes on its territory would cross a "red line" and trigger retaliation, in response to Trump administration threats to target Iranian infrastructure. The escalation comes as negotiations stall, raising tensions in a critical global energy chokepoint. The standoff creates uncertainty around international relations and potential military conflict.
content: Trump warned that the U.S. will target Iranian infrastructure next week if negotiations do not resume.

zh.title: 伊朗警告美国霍尔木兹海峡"红线"，称将报复特朗普的打击威胁
zh.summary: 伊朗发出警告，美国对其领土的打击将越过"红线"并引发报复，以回应特朗普政府对伊朗基础设施的打击威胁。随着谈判陷入僵局，升级会加剧关键全球能源咽喉要道的紧张局势。这一僵持为国际关系和潜在军事冲突创造了不确定性。

title: Investigation into parking tickets for drivers queuing at petrol stations
summary: UK regulators are investigating potentially unfair parking ticketing practices affecting drivers waiting at petrol stations. The investigation is part of a broader regulatory crackdown on private parking operators' enforcement methods. This reflects growing consumer protection concerns about controversial parking industry practices.
content: It's part of a wider crackdown from the consumer regulator into potentially unfair practices by private parking operators.

zh.title: 对在加油站排队的驾驶员停车罚单的调查
zh.summary: 英国监管机构正在调查影响在加油站等候的驾驶员的潜在不公平停车罚单做法。该调查是对私人停车运营商执法方法进行更广泛监管打击的一部分。这反映了人们对有争议的停车行业做法日益增长的消费者保护关切。

title: This mortgage stock should rise even as demand for loans falls, Morgan Stanley says
summary: Morgan Stanley predicts that Rocket Companies' stock could rise despite declining mortgage demand, based on historical patterns when interest rates peak. The forecast suggests that mortgage lenders benefit from rate stabilization even as loan origination volume falls. This contrarian outlook challenges assumptions about mortgage industry dynamics during rate cycles.
content: Rocket Companies is poised to see its stock rise as rates peak, if history is any indication, according to Morgan Stanley.

zh.title: 即使贷款需求下降，这只抵押贷款股票也应该上升，摩根士丹利表示
zh.summary: 摩根士丹利预测，基于利率见顶时的历史模式，火箭公司的股票可能会上涨，尽管抵押贷款需求下降。该预测表明，即使贷款发放量下降，抵押贷款机构也会从利率稳定中受益。这种反向观点挑战了关于利率周期中抵押贷款行业动态的假设。

title: UnitedHealth blows past estimates, hikes earnings outlook as it reins in costs
summary: UnitedHealth significantly exceeded earnings expectations and raised its outlook by aggressively managing costs through membership adjustments and contract exits. The company is investing $1.5 billion in artificial intelligence to improve efficiency and margins. The strategy prioritizes profitability over growth, signaling a shift in healthcare competitive dynamics.
content: The healthcare giant is working to stabilize margins by shrinking membership, exiting unprofitable contracts and pouring $1.5 billion into AI.

zh.title: 联合健康超出预期，收益前景提升，同时控制成本
zh.summary: 联合健康通过积极管理成本（包括会员调整和合同退出）显著超过了收益预期，并提高了前景。该公司投资15亿美元用于人工智能，以提高效率和利润率。该战略优先考虑盈利而非增长，标志着医疗保健竞争动态的转变。

title: Nvidia-backed Fireworks hits $17.5 billion valuation as companies pursue cheaper AI models
summary: AI infrastructure company Fireworks has achieved a $17.5 billion valuation while diversifying its revenue beyond early reliance on coding startup Cursor. The valuation reflects growing market demand for cost-effective AI models as companies seek alternatives to expensive large language models. The shift demonstrates emerging economics of the AI market where efficiency and affordability are competitive advantages.
content: Fireworks once relied heavily on revenue from coding startup Cursor, but has diversified in the past year as more companies reach for lower-cost AI models.

zh.title: 英伟达支持的Fireworks达到175亿美元估值，因为公司追求更便宜的AI模型
zh.summary: AI基础设施公司Fireworks已达到175亿美元估值，同时使其收入多样化，超越了对编码初创公司Cursor的早期依赖。该估值反映了对具有成本效益的AI模型的市场需求不断增长，因为公司寻求昂贵大型语言模型的替代品。这一转变展示了AI市场中新兴的经济学，其中效率和可负担性是竞争优势。

title: Ukraine's Zelenskyy ousts defense minister in surprise shake-up as protest calls emerge
summary: Ukrainian President Zelenskyy dismissed the defense minister in a surprise reshuffle, prompting calls for peaceful protests. The move comes shortly after Prime Minister Yulia Svyrydenko's resignation, signaling significant shifts in the country's leadership during ongoing conflict.
content: The move sparked some to call for a peaceful protest and comes shortly after Ukraine's parliament accepted the resignation of Prime Minister Yulia Svyrydenko.

zh.title: 乌克兰泽连斯基突然罢免国防部长，引发抗议呼声
zh.summary: 乌克兰总统泽连斯基在一次突然改组中罢免了国防部长，引发了和平抗议的呼声。此举紧跟在总理尤利娅·斯维里年科辞职之后，预示着该国在持续冲突中的领导层发生重大变动。

title: Foreign investors sweeten on Indian government bonds as equities see a sell-off
summary: Foreign investors are increasing interest in Indian government bonds ahead of potential inclusion in the Bloomberg index, offering an alternative amid equity market weakness. The move reflects confidence in India's fixed-income market and macroeconomic outlook.
content: The Indian government bond market is drawing interest from foreign investors as it readies for a likely inclusion in Bloomberg index.

zh.title: 随着股市抛售，外国投资者对印度政府债券的兴趣增加
zh.summary: 在可能纳入彭博指数之前，外国投资者对印度政府债券的兴趣增加，在股市疲软之际提供了替代选择。此举反映了对印度固定收益市场和宏观经济前景的信心。

title: TSMC to invest additional $100 billion in Arizona after second-quarter profit soars 77%
summary: TSMC announced a $100 billion additional investment in Arizona following a 77% surge in second-quarter profits. The expansion underscores the chipmaker's commitment to U.S. semiconductor manufacturing capacity.
content: TSMC announced a second-quarter profit, following its June revenue figures released earlier this week.

zh.title: 台积电第二季度利润飙升77%后，将在亚利桑那州追加投资1000亿美元
zh.summary: 台积电在第二季度利润飙升77%之后宣布在亚利桑那州追加投资1000亿美元。该扩张凸显了这家芯片制造商对美国半导体制造能力的承诺。

title: British Steel taken into public ownership to protect 'vital' UK supply
summary: The British government has officially nationalized British Steel at the Scunthorpe steelworks under newly enacted powers to protect critical UK industrial supply chains. The move aims to preserve the steelmaker as a vital strategic asset.
content: The Scunthorpe steelworks has been officially nationalised under new government powers passed this week.

zh.title: 英国钢铁被收归国有以保护"关键"英国供应
zh.summary: 英国政府根据新颁布的权力，已正式将英国钢铁公司位于斯坎索普的钢铁厂国有化，以保护关键的英国工业供应链。此举旨在将这家钢铁制造商保护为一项重要的战略资产。

title: UK economy returns to growth in May
summary: The UK economy expanded modestly in May, reversing the previous month's contraction and signaling renewed growth momentum. The recovery suggests stabilization in economic activity after a period of weakness.
content: The modest growth reverses a slight contraction that had been seen the previous month.

zh.title: 英国经济在5月份恢复增长
zh.summary: 英国经济在5月份出现温和增长，扭转了上个月的萎缩，表明增长动力重新启动。这次复苏表明经济活动在经历一段疲软期后出现稳定。

title: U.S. slaps 25% tariff on most Brazilian goods over 'unfair trade practices'
summary: The U.S. imposed a 25% tariff on most Brazilian goods citing unfair trade practices, with an additional 12.5% tariff possible pending investigation into forced-labor enforcement. The levies escalate trade tensions between the two nations.
content: A separate U.S. probe into forced-labor enforcement could see an additional 12.5% duty on Brazilian goods on top of the 25%, with the decision due next week.

zh.title: 美国因"不公平贸易行为"对巴西商品征收25%关税
zh.summary: 美国以不公平贸易行为为由，对大多数巴西商品征收25%的关税，并且根据强制劳动执法调查的结果，可能征收额外的12.5%关税。这些关税加剧了两国之间的贸易紧张局势。

title: Alibaba and Baidu shares jump in Hong Kong on Apple AI partnership
summary: Alibaba and Baidu shares surged on news of an Apple AI partnership, reflecting investor optimism amid intensifying U.S.-China competition for artificial intelligence dominance. The development highlights the strategic importance of AI alliances globally.
content: The technological rivalry between China and the U.S. has intensified, as they race for AI dominance.

zh.title: 阿里巴巴和百度因苹果AI合作在香港股价飙升
zh.summary: 阿里巴巴和百度因苹果AI合作消息股价飙升，反映投资者在美中人工智能主导权竞争加剧中的乐观情绪。这一发展突显了全球AI联盟的战略重要性。

title: Stock futures little changed ahead of retail sales, jobs data; South Korea's Kospi tumbles 7% in chip rout: Live updates
summary: Investors are monitoring retail sales and jobless claims data for signs of economic slowdown that could help control inflation, while South Korea's Kospi index plunged 7% amid a semiconductor selloff. The mixed signals highlight ongoing concerns about economic momentum and regional tech sector pressures.
content: Investors are looking ahead to retail sales data and jobless claims for further signs the economy is slowing enough to keep inflation under control.

zh.title: 股票期货在零售销售和就业数据前表现平稳；韩国科斯比指数在芯片崩盘中下跌7%：实时更新
zh.summary: 投资者关注零售销售和失业申请数据，寻找可能有助于控制通胀的经济放缓迹象，而韩国科斯比指数在半导体抛售中下跌7%。混合信号凸显对经济势头和地区技术部门压力的持续担忧。

title: Bank of Korea raises rates to 2.75% in first hike in over three years
summary: The Bank of Korea raised its key interest rate by 25 basis points to 2.75%, marking its first increase in over three years. The move aligns with economist expectations as the central bank addresses inflation pressures and represents a significant shift in Korea's monetary policy.
content: The 25 basis point hike by the Bank of Korea was in line with a survey of economists polled by Reuters.

zh.title: 韩国央行将利率上调至2.75%，这是三年多来首次加息
zh.summary: 韩国央行将关键利率上调25个基点至2.75%，这是三年多来首次上调。此举符合经济学家的预期，因为央行正在应对通胀压力，代表韩国货币政策的重大转变。

title: SK Hynix shares plunge 11% as Asia sees tech rout, tracking U.S. chip losses
summary: SK Hynix shares fell 11% as Asian semiconductor stocks broadly declined, mirroring recent losses among U.S. chipmakers. The regional selloff underscores broader concerns about the tech sector's profitability and demand amid global chip market weakness.
content: Asian semiconductor stocks tumbled on Thursday as a selloff in U.S. chipmakers spilled into the region.

zh.title: SK海力士股价下跌11%，亚洲科技股大跌，追踪美国芯片损失
zh.summary: 随着亚洲半导体股票广泛下滑，SK海力士股价下跌11%，反映了美国芯片制造商最近的损失。地区性抛售凸显了对科技部门盈利能力和需求的更广泛担忧，面临全球芯片市场疲软。

title: Ex-Fed advisor gets over three years in prison for lying about China ties
summary: A former Federal Reserve advisor has been sentenced to over three years in prison for failing to disclose ties to China. The case represents one of the most prominent U.S. prosecutions alleging Chinese intelligence targeting of American institutions.
content: The case marks one of the most prominent U.S. prosecutions alleging Chinese intelligence targeting of U.S. institutions, as Trump intensifies its pursuit of foreign economic espionage.

zh.title: 前美联储顾问因隐瞒中国关系获刑三年多
zh.summary: 一名前联邦储备委员会顾问因未能披露与中国的关系而被判处三年多监禁。该案代表了美国最具影响力的起诉案之一，涉及中国情报机构针对美国机构的活动。

title: AI is so big, it’s now impossible for investors to avoid
summary: Artificial intelligence exposure has become virtually impossible for investors to avoid, saturating stocks, corporate credit, and venture capital markets. The AI boom has systematically reshaped investment landscapes across multiple asset classes, making diversification away from the technology trend nearly impossible.
content: Exposure to the artificial-intelligence boom has become virtually impossible for investors to avoid. The theme hasn’t just cornered the stock market. It has systematically swallowed up corporate credit and venture capital, too.

zh.title: 人工智能规模巨大，投资者现在无法回避
zh.summary: 人工智能敞口已经成为投资者几乎不可能规避的现象，已渗透到股票、企业信用和风险投资市场。人工智能热潮已经系统地重塑了多个资产类别的投资格局，使得远离这一技术趋势的分散投资几乎不可能。

title: United Airlines gets hit by a $6 billion added-fuel-cost headwind
summary: United Airlines projects nearly $6 billion in additional fuel expenses for the year, creating a significant headwind to company profitability. The airline industry's exposure to volatile fuel costs continues to pressure investor returns and squeeze margins across the sector.
content: Investors zero in on United’s potentially fatter jet-fuel bill — the airline said it expects nearly $6 billion in additional fuel expenses for the year.

zh.title: 联合航空公司遭遇60亿美元的燃料成本压力
zh.summary: 联合航空公司预计今年将新增约60亿美元的燃料开支，对公司盈利能力形成重大压力。航空业面临波动油价敞口，继续对投资者回报造成压力，并挤压整个行业的利润率。

title: The trucking market is tighter than it’s been in years — but investors are upbeat on J.B. Hunt
summary: J.B. Hunt's stock surged 8% after hours as the trucking giant reported strong results from a tight freight market and growing railroad-connected services. The company's diversified revenue streams are proving resilient in a supply-constrained environment.
content: Shares of the trucking giant jump 8% after hours, as fuel charges and demand for its railroad-connection business lift results

zh.title: 卡车运输市场紧张程度创多年新高——投资者仍看好J.B. Hunt
zh.summary: J.B. Hunt盘后股价上涨8%，这家卡车运输巨头在紧张货运市场和日益增长的铁路相关服务中取得强劲业绩。该公司多元化收入流在供应受限的环境中展现出韧性。
